chunks.text: And in today's time, we will talk about ChatGbT or Google bar. How it works with the help of Generative AI.

chunks.text: So, if I want to make you an explanatory model of this type, first of all, we have AI.

chunks.title: What is Generative AI？ (Explained in Hindi) - Umar Tazkeer [_vTV0TEj4BI]
chunks.text: So, Artificial Intelligence is done by machine learning and deep learning. Machine learning or deep learning is basically training systems on past data.

chunks.text: So, how is the traditional AI, how is the generative AI that we are talking about today or the applications of Generative AI that we are talking about today?
